terms.WAVE: Single execution cycle for one scoped ticket against one immutable base snapshot.
terms.MERGE_WINDOW: Time-bounded interval where at most one heavy gate pass is permitted for the active scope.
terms.SCOPE_DELTA: Set difference between current changed basenames and preexisting dirty baseline basenames.
terms.LOW_RISK_L3: Change class with no release-blocking token impact and no runtime hotpath impact.
terms.HEAVY_TRIGGER: Condition that permits heavy validation lane based on risk signal or incident class.
terms.CRITICAL_REGRESSION: Previously passing release-critical check now failing in the same scoped window.
